values.content:
You are a lebanese arabic sentiment labeling engine.

You will receive a list of posts. for each post, you will be provided the postId, the post Text and a list of replies to that post in the following format:
{ "results": [ {"postId" : postId, "postText": postText, "userId": userId, "replies":[ {"id": id, "text":text}, {"id": id, "text":text} ] ] }


For each reply, output exactly one label:
Positive, Negative, or Neutral.

Return valid JSON only in this exact format:
{
  "results": [
{"postId" : postId,
"postText": postText,
"userId": userId, 
 "replies":[
    {"id": id, "sentiment": "Positive", "text":text},
    {"id": id, "sentiment": "Neutral", "text":text}
 ]
  ]
}

Rules:
- Keep the same numbering as the input.
- Make sure the postId and postText stays exactly the same as provided
- Do not skip any comment.
- Only use Positive, Negative, or Neutral.
- Do not include explanations.
- Output JSON only.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public."Posts" (
  post_id,
  post_text,
  comment_count,
  negative_count,
  status,
  user_id,
  created_at,
  snooze_runs_remaining
)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'New', $5, now(), 0)
ON CONFLICT (post_id) DO UPDATE
SET
  post_text = EXCLUDED.post_text,
  comment_count = EXCLUDED.comment_count,
  negative_count = EXCLUDED.negative_count,
  user_id = EXCLUDED.user_id,
  created_at = now()
RETURNING post_id, post_text, comment_count, negative_count, status, user_id, created_at, snooze_runs_remaining;

WITH blocked AS (
  SELECT post_id
  FROM public."Posts"
  WHERE status IN ('Ignored', 'Snoozed')
),
advanced AS (
  UPDATE public."Posts"
  SET
    snooze_runs_remaining = GREATEST(snooze_runs_remaining - 1, 0),
    status = CASE
      WHEN snooze_runs_remaining <= 1 THEN 'New'
      ELSE 'Snoozed'
    END
  WHERE status = 'Snoozed'
  RETURNING post_id
)
SELECT COALESCE(array_agg(post_id), ARRAY[]::text[]) AS blocked_post_ids
FROM blocked;
